description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomy was traveling west on 16th Street in the left travel lane, slowing as it approached the intersection 
with Utah Street in San Francisco. The Zoox vehicle operator disengaged from autonomy and braked further for stopped traffic ahead in the 
same travel lane. At that time, a Tesla sedan (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind the Zoox vehicle abruptly attempted a lane change 
maneuver into the adjacent lane on the right,  side-swiping a BMW sedan (Vehicle 3) that was also westbound on 16th Street in the right 
lane. Vehicle 2, after making contact with Vehicle 3, veered back to the left lane behind the Zoox vehicle and rear ended the stopped Zoox 
vehicle. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage, while Vehicle 2 and Vehicle 3 appeared to have sustained moderate damage. There were
 no reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
